# Product Overview

Esco Beach Club is a members-only lifestyle app for discovering curated events, unlocking partner perks, and managing premium membership benefits. Monetization centers on memberships, VIP experiences, and partner offers; the app is not a marketplace.

## Core Features

- **Events & Booking**: Browse upcoming club events with premium, member, or VIP-friendly experiences
- **Membership & Profile**: View member tier, member ID, referral code, and profile details
- **Partner Perks**: Unlock discounts and benefits across hospitality, travel, dining, and wellness partners
- **Loyalty & Rewards**: Track points, earnings, savings, and welcome or referral rewards
- **News & Updates**: Surface venue announcements, specials, and club highlights
- **Private Events**: Submit custom event requests with dates, group size, and contact details
- **Reviews & Feedback**: Capture ratings and written member feedback
- **Authentication**: Support secure account access and profile management

## Key Principles

- **Premium Experience**: Keep the tone polished, aspirational, and membership-first
- **Privacy-First**: Respect member data and collect only what the experience needs
- **Mobile-First**: Optimize for fast iOS/Android flows, with web support where useful
- **Partner-Friendly**: Highlight offers clearly without turning the app into generic ecommerce
